update_message:
🎉 Initial Release

Welcome to DueSense - Your Personal Credit Card Manager!

✨ Features:
• Manage multiple credit cards with custom billing cycles
• Track spending across all your cards
• Calculate cashback automatically
• Monitor credit limits with visual progress
• Get reminders for due dates and EMI payments
• Track money you spent for others
• Find the best card for purchases
• Generate detailed transaction reports
• Complete privacy - all data stored locally

Start managing your credit cards smarter today!
